overall.description: Gameplay footage showing first-person exploration of a post-apocalyptic urban environment. The player runs through a narrow street flanked by a damaged concrete building and massive moss-covered rock formations, navigating toward abandoned vehicles in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: post-apocalyptic urban street with rock debris

agents.ego_description: running steadily forward through the debris-filled street toward the large rock formation ahead

entered.detail: multi-story concrete apartment building with broken windows and structural damage
massive boulder covered in green moss and vegetation blocking part of the street
high-rise apartment building with green-tinted windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow post-apocalyptic street with a damaged concrete building on the left and a massive moss-covered rock formation on the right. The player runs forward toward a tall residential tower visible in the distance, with clear blue sky visible above the structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between building and rock

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward to look at the tall building and rock formation above

agents.ego_description: continuing to run forward while looking up at the surrounding structures, then navigating the narrow gap between the building and rock

segments.scene_description: As the player approaches the rock formation, the camera tilts up to reveal the scale of the surrounding structures. The player navigates through a tight passage between the damaged building and the massive rock, with the tall tower looming ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection area with abandoned vehicles

events.description: abandoned yellow car becomes clearly visible in the center of the street ahead

agents.ego_description: running toward the abandoned vehicles at the intersection, passing the rock formation

entered.detail: yellow sedan covered in white debris parked in the middle of the street
green palm tree growing near the rock formation on the right side

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large rock formation, the street opens slightly to reveal an intersection with abandoned vehicles. A yellow car covered in debris sits in the center of the road, while a palm tree becomes visible on the right. The player continues running toward the intersection as the damaged building recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic urban canyon that gradually opens into a debris-strewn intersection. It begins with a run down a narrow post-apocalyptic street, flanked by a damaged concrete building and a massive moss-covered rock formation under a clear blue sky. As the camera approaches the rock, it tilts upward to emphasize the scale of the surrounding ruins before squeezing through the tight passage toward a looming residential tower. The scene then expands as the player clears the rock formation, causing the damaged building to recede and revealing a wider road. Finally, the path opens fully into an intersection where a debris-covered yellow car sits abandoned beside a solitary palm tree.
